post_fix_for: VIB-4478 lp_v4 fixture + Anvil-Base E2E proof (PR 2)
_provenance.note: Real-Anvil-Base baseline for the lp_v4 fixture. V0 (VIB-4426) ships LP_OPEN with full token attribution and LP_CLOSE with PoolKey-driven attribution; the 32-byte PoolId hash flows end-to-end and matching_policy_version=1 (Primitive.LP_V4) is stamped on every V4 LP event. LP1 flipped FAIL -> PASS thanks to the V4 parser landing real LP events (vs the pre-VIB-4426 LP-dropped state). G3/G6/G13/LP3/LP4 remain non-PASS in V0 because the LP_CLOSE accounting path needs (a) fee separation from PoolManager.getPositionInfo (VIB-4482 / P-V1-A) and (b) PoolKey lookup for historically-deployed pools (a separate follow-up filed by VIB-4478 against this PR — see PR description). These cells are V0-honest non-PASSes locked in this baseline so future V1 progress can demonstrate forward motion.
